# Shared memory pointer  (generated by wire-project.sh — do not hand-edit)

Global/shared AI memory is the canonical private repo:
  https://github.com/slavazeph-coder/ai-memory

Pull + build on any machine:
  git clone https://github.com/slavazeph-coder/ai-memory ~/.ai-memory && bash ~/.ai-memory/build-local.sh

Claude auto-loads it via ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md → @~/.ai-memory/MEMORY.md.
This directory is for PROJECT-specific notes only; promote cross-project
facts up into the canonical repo.
